rationale: R1-R4 are grounded in the pinned tree. R1's CLI-only design is feasible: non-bead panels currently pass beadID "" into ResolveGateFacts, GateIO permits caller-supplied RevParse, verify/tally render Decision.Message locally, and internal/instruct consumes the shared message, so zero internal/panel/instruct/complete diff is the right constraint. R2's regex, mirror identity, and floor tests match the plan. R3's prerequisites exist and panel create lacks --gate today. R4 is correctly comment+test only because Reviewer.model already falls back to Family and validation rejects only the neither-set result.

findings.evidence: cmd/mindspec/panel.go:302-314 leaves beadID empty for non-bead and passes exec.RevParseRef; internal/panel/gate.go:186-189 emits the bead/ message and line 372 rev-parses bead/+beadID; renderPanelVerify/renderPanelTally/tallyExitAction render d.Message in cmd.

plugins/mindspec/workflows/ms-panel.js:138 is /[\x60;|&\n]|\$\(/, so bare $ is not rejected; pinned plugin and .claude copies compare byte-identical; TestWorkflowFiles_EmbedsMsPanel and TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet exist.

panel create flags at cmd/mindspec/panel.go:210-214 have no --gate; Panel.Gate exists at internal/panel/panel.go:91; PanelGateKeys and the gate resolvers/default helper exist at internal/config/config.go:101,750,766,832.
internal/config/config.go:139-144 returns Family when Model is empty, and validateReviewerEntries at 540-550 rejects only r.model()=="", so the planned behavior is already implemented.

Plan symbol and line citations spot-checked against 001ed3a5 resolve. Nonblocking note: the plan text says claims are pinned against 3ddf2a1f, but the requested 001ed3a5 review pin still supports the cited claims.
